$comment: Hand-crafted Copilot-native marketplace schema. Derived empirically from github/awesome-copilot on 2026-05-25. Key evidence files: /.github/plugin/marketplace.json (top-level structure with metadata.pluginRoot), /plugins/ai-team-orchestration/.github/plugin/plugin.json (agents array form, skills array). No published Copilot marketplace JSON schema exists as of this date.

name.description: Human-readable name of the marketplace collection.

pluginRoot.description: Relative path from the marketplace root to the plugins directory (e.g. './plugins').

name.description: Plugin identifier — must match the subdirectory name under pluginRoot.

source.description: Simple subdirectory name resolved against metadata.pluginRoot. No object form for local plugins.
